benefits.description: Increased libido for women, even at low doses after a few days

side_effects.description: Nausea when took too high of dose during titration, lasted whole day
Patchy, uneven tanning initially with concentrated melanin in spots. Darkening of existing moles and brown spots. Eventually evened out on its own.

protocol_notes: Female user with husband who also used MT2 and MT1. Initially took 50 mcg MT2, titrated up but overdid it. Switched to Melanotan I for maintenance due to better results. Notes melanin production continues long after stopping. Started at very low doses. Melanin response significantly enhanced in sun (4 min = 20 min effect). Always wears sunscreen. Took break of 3 months to return to target tan before maintenance. Notes no habit formation. Also uses PT-141 for libido boost.
